use_cases: Form submission and action triggers with multiple visual variants
Navigation and routing interactions with ghost and link variants
Icon-based actions with circular icon buttons
Destructive action confirmation with red destructive variant
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component with Radix UI Slot integration for composition, powered by class-variance-authority for flexible variant management. Features 6 variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), making it suitable for any UI requiring interactive button elements.
